name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Powercat Execution
notes:
This building block detects powercat execution.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Netcat The Powershell Version
SIGMA Description: Adversaries may use a non-application layer protocol for communication between host and C2 server or among infected hosts within a network

Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Powercat Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [powercat or powercat.ps1]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Powercat Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [powercat  or powercat.ps1]
